title: modern aesthetics
description: give textures such as bow and crossbow a more industrial look
body:
this pack is made by me 



this resource pack remade some of the item textures to look a bit more modern and industral, including crossbow, bow, trident, shears, all types of fishing rods, and flint and steel
![these all all the items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec736c8e0eaed7aa889619e83aa403ddd331cfe.png)

this is just a little project to experiment with making resource packs
